Prompt: Calculate a list of duplicate md5 sum hashes for all the ".java" files in the /testbed directory
Functionally Equivalent Command: find /testbed -type f -name "*.java" -exec md5sum {} + | sort | uniq -w32 -d -c | sort -nr

Prompt: Calculate the md5 sum of the md5 sum of all the files under /testbed/dir2/subdir2 sorted by filename
Ground Truth Command: find /testbed/dir2/subdir2 -type f -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | md5sum
Functionally Equivalent Command: ls -1 /testbed/dir2/subdir2/* | sort | xargs md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | md5sum

Prompt: Calculate the md5 sum of the contents of the sorted list of files "$FILES"
Functionally Equivalent Command: echo "$FILES" | tr ' ' '\n' | sort | xargs cat | md5sum

Prompt: Calculate the md5 sum of the sorted list of md5 sums of all ".py" files under /testbed/dir1/subdir1
Ground Truth Command: find /testbed/dir1/subdir1 -type f -name *.py -exec md5sum {} + | awk '{print $1}' | sort | md5sum
Functionally Equivalent Command: find /testbed/dir1/subdir1 -type f -name '*.py' -print0 | xargs -0 md5sum | awk '{print $1}' | sort | md5sum

Check if the current shell is running within a 'screen' process and print "True" or "False"
Functionally Equivalent Command: ps -o comm= $(pstree -sp $$ | awk -F '[^0-9]*' '{print $2}') | grep -q 'screen' && echo "True" || echo "False"

Prompt: Print "True" if the contents of file /testbed/dir3/subdir1/subsubdir1/textfile3.txt is a subset of file /testbed/dir2/subdir1/textfile2.txt, otherwise print "False"
Ground Truth Command: comm -23 <(sort /testbed/dir3/subdir1/subsubdir1/textfile3.txt | uniq) <(sort /testbed/dir2/subdir1/textfile2.txt | uniq) | head -1 | grep -q '.' && echo "False" || echo "True"
Functionally Equivalent Command: comm -23 <(sort /testbed/dir3/subdir1/subsubdir1/textfile3.txt | uniq) <(sort /testbed/dir2/subdir1/textfile2.txt | uniq) | grep -q '.' && echo "False" || echo "True"

Prompt: Compute the mean average of the word count of *.txt files in the /testbed directory
Functionally Equivalent Command: find /testbed -type f -name "*.txt" -exec wc -w {} + | awk '{total = $1} END {print total/(NR-1)}'

Prompt: Compute the mean average of the word count of *.txt files smaller than 6 words in the /testbed directory
Ground Truth Command: find /testbed -name '*.txt' -print0 | xargs -0 wc -w | awk '$1 < 6 {v += $1; c++} END {print v/c}'
Functionally Equivalent Command: find /testbed -name '*.txt' -print0 | xargs -0 wc -w | awk '$1 < 6 {v += $1; c++} END {print v/c, "words"}'
